currentPassword.description: Account password for authentication. Lenient validation (1-128 chars) to support legacy accounts; new passwords must satisfy the stricter PasswordSchema policy.

allOf.description: Password (8-128 chars). Must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character (@$!%*?&).

newPassword.description: Password (8-128 chars). Must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character (@$!%*?&).

description: Self-service password change. Requires the current password (lenient validation) and a new password meeting the strict policy.
